_comment: Manual corrections applied after Claude extraction. Each rule replaces a quote's driver/team if its quote text contains 'matchText' (case-insensitive substring) and the round/session match. Use this for misattributions that Claude can't catch from caption-only transcripts (e.g. speaker confusion within the same team or across teams). Keep this list short — prefer fixing the prompt when possible.

overrides.reason: Speaker is Hamilton's Ferrari teammate (Leclerc), not Antonelli. Transcript: 'Lewis has done an incredible job... I've got Lewis in the same car'.
Same speaker as above (continuous interview): Leclerc describing his difficult Canadian weekend while praising teammate Hamilton's podium.
